Our Identity

The Meaning Behind Our Logo

Every element of the MATS logo has been chosen with purpose — here is what it represents.

🌍
The World Map
Symbolises our ambition to connect Nepal to global travellers — bridging the world to Nepal's beauty.
🤝
Hands Reaching Out
Represents hospitality, trust and service — embodying the spirit of Maitri (friendship).
🔵
Blue Colour
Denotes reliability, professionalism and the sky — connecting us to travel and exploration.
🌿
Green Colour
Represents nature, sustainability and Nepal's lush landscapes — Terai to the Himalayas.
⚪
White Text
Reflects transparency and a fresh start — our commitment to honest, ethical business.
📞 9851007025 📞 01-5242452 ✉ info@mats.com.np
Our Purpose

Why MATS Exists

The name Maitri means friendship in Sanskrit. Everything we do is built on that foundation — warm, honest, reliable service for every traveller.

🚀
Our Mission
Building a Brand You Come Back To
To build a trusted brand that inspires repeat travel by managing the necessary infrastructure for travel and hospitality — making every journey smooth, reliable and worth repeating.
🌄
Our Vision
Nepal, Experienced Deeply
To provide customer-centric, organised accommodation, travel and hospitality services for those who wish to learn about Nepal's culture and traditions and explore its natural beauty.

"सुरक्षित एवं आरामदायी वसोवासको साथमा नेपालको संस्कृती, परम्परा,
प्राकृतिक मनमोहक दृश्यहरुको अवलोकन गर्ने अवसर"

Maitri Apartment & Travel Services Pvt. Ltd.

Why Choose MATS

We are a licensed, registered agency — not just a social media page. Here is what sets us apart.

🏛️
Officially Licensed
Travel Agency Licence No. 4593/082/083. Registered Private Limited Company under the laws of Nepal.

We respond within 1–2 hours on WhatsApp. Real people, not bots. Your ticket confirmed and sent directly to you.

All Airlines, One Place
Domestic and international flights. We search across all available airlines to find you the best fare and schedule.

Flexible Payment
eSewa, Khalti, bank transfer or cash — pay the way that works for you. Simple, transparent pricing.
🤝
Maitri — Friendship
Our name says it all. We treat every customer like a friend — honest advice, fair prices, genuine care.
📍
Local Kathmandu Knowledge
Based in Mitrapark-7, Kathmandu. We know Nepal — and we are here to help you navigate it.
What We Do

All Your Nepal Travel Needs,
One Place

From booking your flight to finding a place to stay — MATS handles every part of your Nepal journey.

✈️
Flight Ticketing
Domestic & international air tickets. We find the best available fare and schedule across all major airlines serving Nepal.
🚌
Bus & Transport
Tourist buses, deluxe coaches, private jeeps and vehicles across all major Nepal routes — booked and confirmed for you.
🗺️
Tour Packages
Domestic sightseeing, cultural tours, pilgrimage packages and group excursions tailored for Nepali travellers.
🏠
Short-Term Stays
Comfortable partner accommodation listings in Kathmandu for short-term and long-term stays — carefully selected for quality.
🎵
Tourism Promotion
Promoting Nepal's destinations through TikTok @matsnepal, digital media and tourism partnerships at national level.

🧗
Adventure Packages
  • Trekking in the Himalayas
  • Zip flying, skydiving & bungee jumping
  • Motorbiking & mountain biking expeditions
  • Rafting, kayaking & canyoning
  • Paragliding, hiking & camping
  • Cave exploration & hot air balloon rides
🌿
Nature & Wildlife
  • Bird watching and butterfly watching
  • Mountain viewing & jungle discovery
  • Nagarkot sunrise and sunset tours
  • Wetland exploration
🏛️
Cultural & Heritage
  • Village tours & homestays
  • Traditional crafts and meet-the-people experiences
  • Food & culinary tours
  • Heritage walks & museum visits
🧘
Wellness & Rejuvenation
  • Ayurveda and Panchakarma treatments
  • Sound meditation experiences
  • Natural hot water springs
🎊
Special Packages
  • Destination weddings in Nepal

Why Book Through MATS

More Than Just a Room

When you book accommodation through MATS, you get more than just a key. We are your local Kathmandu contact — available on WhatsApp to help with transport, tours, directions and anything else you need during your stay.

Perfect for visiting professionals, families attending events, or travellers wanting a comfortable base while exploring the Kathmandu Valley.

Local Support Always Available
We are on WhatsApp — not some faceless booking platform.

Add a Kathmandu Valley tour to your stay — we handle both.

Ask us about transport from Tribhuvan International Airport.
Flexible Duration
Short stays or long-term monthly arrangements available.

Frequently Asked Questions

Got Questions? We Have Answers.

Everything you need to know about MATS and travelling in Nepal.

What does MATS stand for?
MATS stands for Maitri Apartment & Travel Services. Our official business name is Maitri Apartment & Travel Services Pvt. Ltd. The name Maitri means "friendship" in Sanskrit — reflecting our commitment to warm, reliable service. We are a registered Private Limited Company under the laws of Nepal. Travel Agency Licence No. 4593/082/083.
Where is MATS located?
We are based in Mitrapark-7, Kathmandu, Nepal — close to Tribhuvan International Airport and popular tourist destinations. Find our exact location via Google Maps. For appointments, please contact us first.
Do you book international flights?
Yes! MATS provides both domestic and international flight ticket booking. Whether you are flying within Nepal or travelling to Dubai, Delhi, Bangkok, Singapore, London or anywhere else — contact us with your travel details and we will find you the best available fare.
Do you offer domestic travel packages?
We currently offer the Char Ganesh Pilgrimage and Char Narayan Temples tour. We are actively developing a full range of Nepal travel packages — religious, adventure, wildlife, cultural and wellness. Stay tuned for updates.
How do I book a flight or bus ticket?
(1) Fill in the booking form on this page or contact us. (2) Our team confirms availability and fare within 1–2 hours. (3) Pay via eSewa, Khalti, bank transfer or cash. (4) Your e-ticket is sent directly to your WhatsApp or email. Simple and fast.
What payment methods do you accept?
We accept eSewa, Khalti, bank transfer and cash. For international clients, please contact us to arrange payment.
Do you provide airport pickup?
Yes, we can arrange airport pickup and drop-off from Tribhuvan International Airport, Kathmandu. Contact us in advance with your flight details and we will arrange a vehicle for you.
What is the latest travel information for Nepal?
Visit the Nepal Tourism Board — Latest Travel Updates for current advisories. For visa info: Tourist Visa. For TIMS cards: TIMS Card.
Is MATS a registered company?
Yes. Fully registered Private Limited Company in Nepal. Travel Agency Licence: 4593/082/083 · Company Reg: 358879 · PAN: 621282090 · Small Industry Reg: 4240/082/083.
Can I cancel or change my booking?
Cancellation and change policies depend on the airline or bus operator. Contact us as soon as possible if you need to make changes — we will check what is possible and guide you through the process.

Privacy Policy FAQ Useful Links Contact
Privacy Policy
Last updated: March 2025 · Maitri Apartment & Travel Services Pvt. Ltd.

1. Information We Collect

When you submit a booking request or contact us, we collect your name, phone number, email address, travel details and any other information you voluntarily provide. We do not collect payment information directly — payments are handled separately via agreed methods (eSewa, Khalti, bank transfer or cash).

2. How We Use Your Information

  • To process your flight, bus or tour booking requests
  • To contact you via WhatsApp, phone or email about your booking
  • To send your e-ticket or booking confirmation
  • To respond to your enquiries and provide customer support

3. Information Sharing

We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties for marketing purposes. We only share your details with airlines, bus operators or accommodation providers strictly as required to complete your booking.

4. Data Security

We take reasonable measures to protect your personal information. No transmission over the internet is completely secure. We encourage you to contact us on WhatsApp for sensitive communications.

5. Cookies

This website does not use tracking cookies or third-party analytics tools. Google Maps embedded on this page may set cookies according to Google's own privacy policy.

6. Your Rights

You may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal information at any time by contacting us at info@mats.com.np or on WhatsApp at 9823356668.

7. Contact

For privacy-related concerns: info@mats.com.np · 9851007025 · Maitri Apartment & Travel Services Pvt. Ltd., Mitrapark-7, Kathmandu, Nepal.
